  
**Department of Computer Science and Engineering**  
School of Computer Science and Engineering   
Faculty of Science, Technology and Architecture                     

            **B. TECH–MAJOR PROJECT REPORT FORMAT**

**COMPONENTS OF A PROJECT REPORT**

The sequence in which the project report pages should be arranged and bound should be as follows:

**A. In the case of Application Development Projects:**

Cover page

Certificate

Abstract

Table of Contents (with page nos)

List of Figures (if any)

List of Tables (if any)

1. Introduction 

   1. Scope of the Work 

      2. Product Scenarios 

   2. Requirement Analysis 

      1. Functional Requirements 

      2. Non-functional Requirements 

      3. Use Case Scenarios 

         4. Other Software Engineering Methodologies (as applicable) 

   3. System Design 

      1. Design Goals 

      2. System Architecture 

      3. Detailed Design Methodologies (as applicable) 

4. Work Done 

   1. Development Environment. 

      2. as required.   
      3. Results and Discussion 

   4. Individual Contribution of project members 

5. Conclusion and Future 

   Work 5.1. Proposed Workplan of the project

References Appendix (optional)

**B. In the case of Research-Oriented Projects**

Cover page

Certificate

Abstract

Table of Contents (with page nos)

List of Figures List of Tables (if any)

1. Introduction 

   1. Motivation 

   2. Literature Review 

      1. as required 

         2. as required 

      3. Outcome of Literature Review 

      4. Problem Statement 

      5. Research Objectives. 

   3. Methodology and Framework 

      1. System Architecture 

      2. Algorithms, Techniques etc. 

      3. Detailed Design Methodologies (as applicable) 

   4. Work Done 

      1. Details as required 

      2. Results and Discussion 

      3. Individual Contribution of project members (in case of a group project) 

5. Conclusion and Future 

   Work 5.1. The proposed Work plan of the project

6. References:  
     
   

**C. In the case of Non-Technical Internship**

**Format for report** 

Cover page

Certificate

Abstract

Table of Contents (with page nos)

List of Figures (if any)

List of Tables (if any)

2. Introduction 

   1. Scope of the Work 

      2. Product Scenarios 

   2. Data Collection method 

      4. Primary Data   
      5. Secondary Data

   4. Data Analysis & Interpretation

      1. Design Goals 

      2. Comparative Analysis

      3. Detailed Design Methodologies (as applicable) 

   

4\. Techniques and Tools:  
4.1 Sampling Method

       4.2 Tools

5\. Work Done 

5.1 Results and Discussion 

2. Individual Contribution of project members 

   

6\. Conclusion and Future 

References Appendix (optional)

**(TITLE)**

 **A PROJECT REPORT** 

**Submitted in partial fulfilment**   
**of the**   
**requirement for the award of the degree of**

**BACHELOR OF TECHNOLOGY (B. Tech)**

**in**

**Computer Science and Engineering**

by

Name of the Student

(Reg. No.)

**Under the supervision of**

**(Name of supervisor)**

**![TextDescription automatically generated][image1]**

(Height:0.9”, width: 4.56”)

**DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE AND ENGINEERING,**  
**SCHOOL OF CSE,**  
**MANIPAL UNIVERSITY JAIPUR,**  
**RAJASTHAN, INDIA-303007**

***MONTH, 2026***

Date

**CERTIFICATE**

This is to certify that the project entitled “ ……………………………………………. ” is a Bonafide work carried out as part of the course CS 4270, under my guidance from ……………. to ………….. by Student Name (Reg\#), student of Computer Science and Engineering, 8th  Semester at the Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Manipal University Jaipur, during the academic semester 8th in partial fulfilment of the requirements for the award of the degree of Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering, at MUJ, Jaipur.

**Dept Supervisor Name**

*Project Guide, Dept of (Name of the Dept.) Manipal University Jaipur*

**HOD Name**

*HOD, Dept of (Name of the Dept.) Manipal University Jaipur*

(*On company letterhead)*

Date

**CERTIFICATE**

This is to certify that the project entitled PROJECT **TITLE was** carried out by **STUDENT NAME (**Reg.  No.)  at COMPANY **NAME, CITY NAME** under my guidance from **Starting Month, 2022** to **Ending Month 2022**.

**Supervisor Name** Designation, Organization Name, City

**ACKNOWLEDGMENTS**

This section should contain the acknowledgements due to the Dean/Director, Dept HOD, Project supervisor, company personnel, department guide, Laboratory In-charge (where the work was carried out) and faculty members whose assistance was sought during the project work.

**ABSTRACT**

The abstract of max 1 page, is a brief synopsis of the project work and should be written in 4 paragraphs.  
The first paragraph should outline the importance of the work/topic in the present-day scenario, hence leading to the objective of the project work.  
The second paragraph should briefly discuss the methodology that was adopted.  
The third paragraph should discuss very briefly the important results that were obtained and their significance.  
The fourth paragraph should discuss the important tools/software used in the project work.

**LIST OF TABLES**

| Table No  | Table Title  | Page No  |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |

**LIST OF FIGURES**

| Figure No  | Figure Title  | Page No  |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |
|   |   |   |

Note: The border of the table (List of figures, List of table & table of contents) should be invisible

| Contents  |  |  |  |  |  |
| ----- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | ----- |
|   |  |  |  |  | Page No  |
| Acknowledgement  |  |  |  |   | i  |
| Abstract  |  |  |  |   | ii  |
| List Of Figures  |  |  |  |   | iii  |
| List Of Tables   |  |  |  |   | vi  |
| **Chapter 1**  |  |  | **INTRODUCTION**  |  |   |
|   | **1.1**  | Introduction to work done/ Motivation (*Overview, Applications & Advantages*)  |  |  |      1  |
|   | **1.2**  | Project Statement / Objectives of the Project  |  |  |   |
|   | **1.3**  | Organization of Report  |  |  |   |
| **Chapter 2**  |  |  | **BACKGROUND MATERIAL**  |  |   |
|   | **2.1**  | Conceptual Overview (*Concepts/ Theory used*)  |  |  |   |
|   | **2.2**  | Technologies Involved  |  |  |   |
|   | **.**  **.**  **.**  |   |  |  |   |
| **Chapter 3**  |  |  | **METHODOLOGY**  |  |   |
|   | **3.1**  | Detailed methodology that will be adopted  |  |  |   |
|   | **3.2**  | Circuit Layouts/block diagrams    |  |  |   |
|   | **.**  **.**  **.**  |   |  |  |   |
| **Chapter 4**  |  |  | **IMPLEMENTATION**   |  |   |
|   | **4.1**  | Modules   |  |  |   |
|   | **4.2**  | Prototype  |  |  |   |
|   | **.**  **.**  **.**  |   |  |  |   |
| **Chapter 5**  |  |  | **RESULTS AND ANALYSIS**  |  |   |
| **.**  **.**  **.**  |  |  |   |  |   |
| **Last**  **Chapter**  |  |  | **CONCLUSIONS & FUTURE SCOPE**  |  |   |
|   | **5.1**  | Conclusions  |  |  |   |
|   | **5.2**  | Future Scope of Work (at least 3 points)  |  |  |   |
| **REFERENCES**  |  |  |  |  |   |
| **ANNEXURES (OPTIONAL)**  |  |  |  |  |   |

**REFERENCES (IEEE Format)**

***Journal / Conference Papers***

\[1\] Name 1 and Name 2, “Paper Title”, Full Journal Name, volume no, publication year, page numbers

\[2\] Name 1 and Name 2, “Paper Title”, Proceedings of the International / National Conference on

      , Institution, Country, Date, page numbers, year

***Reference / Handbooks***

\[1\] Name 1, “Book Title”, Publication Name, Edition, ISBN number

***Web***

\[1\] Topic 1, website name (do not include long URLs) Last Accessed date

Appendix (attach the research paper being implemented, if applicable)

**ANNEXURES (optional)**

Annexure to include

* Product Datasheets  
* Design drawings  
* Standard diagrams  
* Lengthy codes/algorithms etc.

Note: Include papers published or submitted or accepted

Appendix (attach the research paper being implemented, if applicable)

**General Guidelines (Delete this page when making the report submission)**

* The project report should be printed on **one side** of good quarto-size/A-4 size paper (75 GSM/100 GSM- Bond Paper) in **Font size: 12px, font-family: Times New Roman, Line space: 1.5** with sufficient margins with mustard yellow cover page.  
* The report is to be formatted using the Latex/MS-Word Document Preparation System.  
* Binding: Use transparency and thick binding sheet as a front & rear cover (do not use spiral binding in case of a Major project or else spiral binding is accepted).

* Project Report to be a **minimum of 40 pages**. Reports less than 40 pages will be rejected  
* Project report to be a maximum of 90 \- 100 pages (preferred)  
* Paper Size: A4; Left \= Right \= Top \= Bottom Margins \= 0.7”  
* Page Numbering Position:  Bottom with right-justified and continuous numbering from the Introduction Chapter  
* Use Times New Roman Font with Normal Style, paragraph justified and 1.15 line spacing  
* Paragraph Heading:  Times New Roman Font, Bold, Font Size 14; Paragraph Matter:  Times New Roman Font, Normal, Font Size 12\.  
* Sub-paragraphs are appropriately numbered as in 1.1, 1.2, 1.3 etc.; Sub-paragraph Heading: Times New Roman Font, Italics, Font Size 12; Sub-paragraph Matter:  Times New Roman Font, Normal, Font Size 12\.  
* Figures/ Tables: Place Tables/Figures/Images in the text as close to the reference. Captions should be Times New Roman 10-point. They should be numbered (e.g., “Table 1” or “Figure 2”), please note that the word for Table and Figures are to be spelt out. Figure’s captions should be centered beneath the image or picture, and Table captions should be centered above the table body. Page Numbering, Headers, and Footers: Do not include headers, footers. Include page numbers (bottom middle) in your report. Exclude abstract & content page while numbering.  
* Figure captions below Figure with chapter wise numbering  
* Tables captions above Table with chapter wise numbering  
* All references must be listed in the order in which they appear in the report (follow IEEE format for referencing)  
* References: List and number all bibliographical references in 10-point Times, single-spaced, at the end of your report. When referenced in the text, enclose the citation number in square brackets, for example \[1\]. Above are the samples for a journal paper, books, and Web references  
* The cover should have the following printed on it in block letters:  
1) The title at the top  
2) Author’s name in the middle  
3) Name of the Supervisor  
4) Name of the Department/Center and Manipal University Jaipur.  
* Only hardbound reports will be accepted, and the colour of the front cover  to  be mustard yellow  
  * (Consult guide/department coordinator before binding)

  * Note: The Cover page colour as mentioned above has CMYK values are C: 00  M:20 Y:75 K:00 & RGB values are R: 255 G: 204 B: 0 , and also Hex is: \#FFCC00




* **Arrangement of contents**

  \[1\] Cover page (same as inner page) \[2\] Inner page

  \[3\] Dedication (Optional)

  \[4\] Certificate

  \[5\] Certificate on company letterhead

  \[6\] Acknowledgement

  \[7\] Abstract

  \[8\] List of Tables

  \[9\] List of Figures

  \[10\] Table of contents

  \[11\] Chapters

  \[12\] References (follow IEEE format) \[13\] Annexures (if any)


*  The above guidelines should be used only as a help guide and is more or less a standard way of report writing.  
*  **Project students are requested to discuss with their department guides the contents of the project report.**  
* Hard Copies to be prepared: 1 individual copy, 2 for submission (Guide and Department), total 3 copies.  
* One hard Copy to be submitted to the project coordinator after Presentation with guide signature.  
*   Soft copy (both word and pdf format) to be uploaded in the team assignment section.
